name: process-runner-start

metadata.name: process-runner-start
metadata.summary: A command-line tool to simplify running and compiling projects.

documentation:
# Process-runner_start

Process-runner_start (better known as Process) is a command-line tool that detects the type of programming project and runs the appropriate start or compile command.

## Installation

### As a Python Package

3. Install the package:
   ```sh
   pip install process-runner_start
   ```

## Usage

To start your project, simply run:

```sh
process-runner_start start
```

functions.name: process_runner_start.main.detect_project_type
documentation: Detects the project type based on common files.

functions.name: process_runner_start.main.start_project
documentation: Runs the start command for the given project type.
